text:

- Take maintainership

+DIST_SUBDIR=	box
+EXTRACT_DEPENDS=pngtopnm:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/netpbm

+post-install:

Changed:
- pkg-plist

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES, CLANG), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
